content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於5月20日21:05進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年6月3日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了在「返校日」活動中領取獎勵後，獎勵按鈕有時未發生變化的問題。
● 修復了克萊門汀關卡、克珀珊特劇情中的錯別字。
● 修復了「雪山消融之時」活動商店立繪丟失的問題。
● 修復了主界面音樂在一些情況下會錯誤播放的問題。

V2.2.1.4 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on May 20 at 21:05(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on June 3 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed the issue where the reward button sometimes didn't change after claiming rewards in the "Back to School" event.  
● Corrected typos in the Clementine level and Coopersant storyline.  
● Fixed the missing artwork issue in the "When the Snow Melts" event shop.  
● Fixed the issue where the main interface music played incorrectly in certain situations.
